query:
(_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query) not query_type=sumo*
user_name=* query=* query_type=* analytics_tier=*
| where query matches /^./
| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 ) as time_range_m
//| sort execution_duration_ms
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as inf_scan_bytes nodrop
| if (isnull(inf_scan_bytes),0,inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes
| avg(execution_duration_ms) as avg_exec_ms,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as data_scanned_bytes, sum(inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes,sum(data_retrieved_bytes) as data_retrieved_bytes , sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events,avg(time_range_m) as avg_time_range_m by user_name,query_type,query,scanned_partition_count,analytics_tier //,session_id
| round((data_scanned_bytes /1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as scan_gbytes
| round((data_retrieved_bytes/1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as retrieved_gbytes
| round((inf_scan_bytes/1024/1024/1024) * 10) / 10 as inf_scan_gbytes

| round(avg_exec_ms / 1000) as avg_exec_s
| count_distinct(user_name) as users,sum(searches) as searches, sum(scan_gbytes) as scan_gbytes, sum(inf_scan_gbytes) as inf_scan_gbytes by query_type | sort searches 
//| sort avg_exec_ms
